items.title: Morgan Stanley files amendments for ETH and SOL ETFs, revealing lowest fees in market
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's low-fee ETF filings for ETH and SOL could enhance institutional interest and liquidity in the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: ‘Cheapest Spot SOL ETF ever!’ – Will Morgan Stanley’s debut spur the altcoin?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of a low-cost SOL ETF by Morgan Stanley may attract more investors, potentially boosting demand and usage of Solana.

items.title: The 5 Largest Publicly Traded Solana Treasury Firms
items.whyYouShouldCare: Identifying the largest publicly traded firms holding Solana treasuries highlights significant institutional backing, which may strengthen Solana's market position.
